./commit-0d25db00/production/components/has/production/kustomize.out.yaml: (object: application-service/application-service-controller-manager apps/v1, Kind=Deployment) object has 3 replicas but does not specify inter pod anti-affinity (check: no-anti-affinity, remediation: Specify anti-affinity in your pod specification to ensure that the orchestrator attempts to schedule replicas on different nodes. Using podAntiAffinity, specify a labelSelector that matches pods for the deployment, and set the topologyKey to kubernetes.io/hostname. Refer to https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/#inter-pod-affinity-and-anti-affinity for details.)

./commit-0d25db00/production/components/has/production/kustomize.out.yaml: (object: application-service/application-service-controller-manager apps/v1, Kind=Deployment) container "manager" does not have a read-only root file system (check: no-read-only-root-fs, remediation: Set readOnlyRootFilesystem to true in the container securityContext.)

./commit-b6f23d27/production/components/has/production/kustomize.out.yaml: (object: application-service/application-service-controller-manager apps/v1, Kind=Deployment) object has 3 replicas but does not specify inter pod anti-affinity (check: no-anti-affinity, remediation: Specify anti-affinity in your pod specification to ensure that the orchestrator attempts to schedule replicas on different nodes. Using podAntiAffinity, specify a labelSelector that matches pods for the deployment, and set the topologyKey to kubernetes.io/hostname. Refer to https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/#inter-pod-affinity-and-anti-affinity for details.)

Git Diff (225 lines) 
  diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
index 1c903cb7..79818233 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
 kind: Kustomization
 resources:
   - sprayproxy
+  - toolchain-host-operator
   - segment-bridge
 components:
   - ../../k-components/deploy-to-host-cluster-merge-generator
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..8c2e8eac
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-host-operator.yaml
+components:
+  - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..aa12727d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-host-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-host-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-host-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-host-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
index 941f9587..801b9195 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ resources:
   - internal-services
   - image-controller
   - segment-bridge
+  - toolchain-member-operator
   - multi-arch-controller
 components:
   - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..5e5c4dae
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-member-operator.yaml

\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..2c2867db
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-member-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-member-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-member-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-member-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m

new file mode 100644
index 00000000..69264da5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/OWNERS
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# See the OWNERS docs: https://go.k8s.io/owners
+
+approvers:
+- mfrancisc
+- MatousJobanek
+- xcoulon

diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..dfb700ec
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+- ./rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..67fdd32c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+kind: Role
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+rules:
+- apiGroups:
+  - ""
+  resources:
+  - "secrets"
+  verbs:
+  - "get"
+  - "list"
+  - "watch"
+  - "create"
+  - "update"
+  - "patch"
+---
+kind: RoleBinding
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+subjects:
+  - kind: User
+    name: mfrancisc
+roleRef:
+  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
+  kind: Role
+  name: edit-secrets

  ./commit-14551b43/production/app-of-apps-production.yaml
1292,1383d1291
< ---
< apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
< kind: ApplicationSet
< metadata:
<   name: toolchain-host-operator
<   namespace: argocd
< spec:
<   generators:
<   - merge:
<       generators:
<       - clusters:
<           selector:
<             matchLabels:
<               appstudio.redhat.com/host-cluster: "true"
<           values:
<             clusterDir: ""
<             environment: staging
<             sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-host-operator
<       - list:
<           elements: []
<       mergeKeys:
<       - nameNormalized
<   template:
<     metadata:
<       name: toolchain-host-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
<     spec:
<       destination:
<         namespace: toolchain-host-operator
<         server: '{{server}}'
<       project: default
<       source:
<         path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
<         repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
<         targetRevision: main
<       syncPolicy:
<         automated:
<           prune: false
<           selfHeal: true
<         retry:
<           backoff:
<             duration: 10s
<             factor: 2
<             maxDuration: 3m
<           limit: -1
<         syncOptions:
<         - CreateNamespace=false
< ---
< apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
< kind: ApplicationSet
< metadata:
<   name: toolchain-member-operator
<   namespace: argocd
< spec:
<   generators:
<   - merge:
<       generators:
<       - clusters:
<           selector:
<             matchLabels:
<               appstudio.redhat.com/member-cluster: "true"
<           values:
<             clusterDir: ""
<             environment: staging
<             sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-member-operator
<       - list:
<           elements: []
<       mergeKeys:
<       - nameNormalized
<   template:
<     metadata:
<       name: toolchain-member-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
<     spec:
<       destination:
<         namespace: toolchain-member-operator
<         server: '{{server}}'
<       project: default
<       source:
<         path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
<         repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
<         targetRevision: main
<       syncPolicy:
<         automated:
<           prune: false
<           selfHeal: true
<         retry:
<           backoff:
<             duration: 10s
<             factor: 2
<             maxDuration: 3m
<           limit: -1
<         syncOptions:
<         - CreateNamespace=false

./commit-80efdf6f/production/components/has/production/kustomize.out.yaml: (object: application-service/application-service-controller-manager apps/v1, Kind=Deployment) object has 3 replicas but does not specify inter pod anti-affinity (check: no-anti-affinity, remediation: Specify anti-affinity in your pod specification to ensure that the orchestrator attempts to schedule replicas on different nodes. 3: Staging changes from 14551b43 to 80efdf6f on Wed Aug 16 10:19:21 2023

Git Diff (225 lines) 
  diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
index 1c903cb7..79818233 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
 kind: Kustomization
 resources:
   - sprayproxy
+  - toolchain-host-operator
   - segment-bridge
 components:
   - ../../k-components/deploy-to-host-cluster-merge-generator
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..8c2e8eac
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-host-operator.yaml
+components:
+  - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..aa12727d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-host-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-host-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-host-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-host-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
index 941f9587..801b9195 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ resources:
   - internal-services
   - image-controller
   - segment-bridge
+  - toolchain-member-operator
   - multi-arch-controller
 components:
   - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..5e5c4dae
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-member-operator.yaml
+components:
+  - ../../../../k-components/deploy-to-member-cluster-merge-generator
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..2c2867db
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-member-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-member-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-member-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-member-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m
diff --git a/components/sandbox/OWNERS b/components/sandbox/OWNERS
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..69264da5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/OWNERS
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# See the OWNERS docs: https://go.k8s.io/owners
+
+approvers:
+- mfrancisc
+- MatousJobanek
+- xcoulon
+- alexeykazakov
+- rajivnathan
diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..dfb700ec
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+- ./rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..67fdd32c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+kind: Role
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+rules:
+- apiGroups:
+  - ""
+  resources:
+  - "secrets"
+  verbs:
+  - "get"
+  - "list"
+  - "watch"
+  - "create"
+  - "update"
+  - "patch"
+---
+kind: RoleBinding
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+subjects:
+  - kind: User
+    name: mfrancisc
+roleRef:
+  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
+  kind: Role
+  name: edit-secrets

new file mode 100644

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+- ../../base

3: Development changes from 14551b43 to 80efdf6f on Wed Aug 16 10:19:21 2023

Git Diff (225 lines) 
  diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
index 1c903cb7..79818233 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/kustomization.yaml
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
 kind: Kustomization
 resources:
   - sprayproxy
+  - toolchain-host-operator
   - segment-bridge
 components:
   - ../../k-components/deploy-to-host-cluster-merge-generator
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..8c2e8eac
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-host-operator.yaml
+components:
+  - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..aa12727d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/host/toolchain-host-operator/toolchain-host-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-host-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-host-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-host-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-host-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
index 941f9587..801b9195 100644
--- a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/kustomization.yaml
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ resources:
   - internal-services
   - image-controller
   - segment-bridge
+  - toolchain-member-operator
   - multi-arch-controller
 components:
   - ../../../k-components/inject-infra-deployments-repo-details
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..5e5c4dae
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+  - toolchain-member-operator.yaml
+components:
+  - ../../../../k-components/deploy-to-member-cluster-merge-generator
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..2c2867db
--- /dev/null
+++ b/argo-cd-apps/base/member/infra-deployments/toolchain-member-operator/toolchain-member-operator.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
+kind: ApplicationSet
+metadata:
+  name: toolchain-member-operator
+spec:
+  generators:
+    - merge:
+        mergeKeys:
+          - nameNormalized
+        generators:
+          - clusters:
+              values:
+                sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-member-operator
+                environment: staging
+                clusterDir: ""
+          - list:
+              elements: []
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      name: toolchain-member-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
+    spec:
+      project: default
+      source:
+        path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
+        repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git
+        targetRevision: main
+      destination:
+        namespace: toolchain-member-operator
+        server: '{{server}}'
+      syncPolicy:
+        automated:
+          prune: false
+          selfHeal: true
+        syncOptions:
+          - CreateNamespace=false
+        retry:
+          limit: -1
+          backoff:
+            duration: 10s
+            factor: 2
+            maxDuration: 3m
diff --git a/components/sandbox/OWNERS b/components/sandbox/OWNERS
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..69264da5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/OWNERS
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# See the OWNERS docs: https://go.k8s.io/owners
+
+approvers:
+- mfrancisc
+- MatousJobanek
+- xcoulon
+- alexeykazakov
+- rajivnathan
diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..dfb700ec
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/kustomization.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:
+- ./rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
diff --git a/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..67fdd32c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/components/sandbox/base/rbac/edit-secrets.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+kind: Role
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+rules:
+- apiGroups:
+  - ""
+  resources:
+  - "secrets"
+  verbs:
+  - "get"
+  - "list"
+  - "watch"
+  - "create"
+  - "update"
+  - "patch"
+---
+kind: RoleBinding
+apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
+metadata:
+  name: edit-secrets
+  labels:
+    provider: codeready-toolchain
+subjects:
+  - kind: User
+    name: mfrancisc
+roleRef:
+  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
+  kind: Role
+  name: edit-secrets

new file mode 100644

+apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
+kind: Kustomization
+resources:

< ---
< apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
< kind: ApplicationSet
< metadata:
<   name: toolchain-host-operator
<   namespace: openshift-gitops
< spec:
<   generators:
<   - merge:
<       generators:
<       - clusters:
<           selector:
<             matchLabels:
<               appstudio.redhat.com/host-cluster: "true"
<           values:
<             clusterDir: ""
<             environment: staging
<             sourceRoot: components/sandbox/toolchain-host-operator
<       - list:
<           elements: []
<       mergeKeys:
<       - nameNormalized
<   template:
<     metadata:
<       name: toolchain-host-operator-{{nameNormalized}}
<     spec:
<       destination:
<         namespace: toolchain-host-operator
<         server: '{{server}}'
<       project: default

<         path: '{{values.sourceRoot}}/{{values.environment}}/{{values.clusterDir}}'
<         repoURL: https://github.com/redhat-appstudio/infra-deployments.git

<       syncPolicy:
<         automated:
<           prune: false
<           selfHeal: true
<         retry:
<           backoff:
<             duration: 10s
<             factor: 2
<             maxDuration: 3m
<           limit: -1
<         syncOptions:
<         - CreateNamespace=false
